examples: Surfrider has been pushing for this for 15 years -- it's just total common sense in terms of public health.
Sure, surfers and groups such as the Surfrider Foundation fight ocean pollution, and companies like Patagonia have long been leaders in sustainability.
The developers of the Carlsbad Desalination Project, meanwhile, also just won a critical court case filed by an environmental organization, called Surfrider Foundation.
